title: Object Container Triplet (0x10)
description: Triplet 0x10 layout describing object class, structure flags, required object ID and optional fields.

elements.name: StrucFlgs
elements.description: Flags that characterize the structure of the object data. Bits are numbered 0 (LSB) to 15 (MSB).

bits.name: ObjectContainer
bits.description: Object Container (BOC/EOC): 00 Reserved; 01 object data not in MO:DCA container; 10 unknown; 11 object data in MO:DCA container

bits.name: OEG
bits.description: Object environment group (OEG): 00 Reserved; 01 no OEG; 10 unknown; 11 OEG included

bits.name: OCD
bits.description: Object Container Data (OCD) fields: 00 Reserved; 01 not carried in OCD; 10 unknown; 11 carried in OCD structured fields
